q: Which payment methods are growing fastest this month compared to last month? Show percentage growth.
sql: SELECT payment_method, COALESCE(((current_month.total_amount - previous_month.total_amount) * 100.0 / NULLIF(previous_month.total_amount, 0)), 0) AS growth_percentage FROM (SELECT payment_method, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM silver_transactions WHERE transaction_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND transaction_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month' AND payment_method IS NOT NULL AND amount IS NOT NULL GROUP BY payment_method) current_month JOIN (SELECT payment_method, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM silver_transactions WHERE transaction_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND transaction_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND payment_method IS NOT NULL AND amount IS NOT NULL GROUP BY payment_method) previous_month ON current_month.payment_method = previous_month.payment_method ORDER BY growth_percentage DESC;

q: Which 5 merchants have the highest refund rate? Show refund count and total transaction count.
sql: SELECT m.merchant_id, m.merchant_name, SUM(CASE WHEN st.status = 'REFUNDED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS refund_count, COUNT(st.transaction_id) AS total_transaction_count, (SUM(CASE WHEN st.status = 'REFUNDED' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(st.transaction_id), 0)) * 100 AS refund_rate_pct FROM merchants m JOIN silver_transactions st ON m.merchant_id = st.merchant_id WHERE st.quality_flag = 'PASS' AND st.transaction_date BETWEEN DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) AND CURRENT_DATE AND st.status IN ('REFUNDED', 'COMPLETED', 'FAILED') GROUP BY m.merchant_id, m.merchant_name ORDER BY refund_rate_pct DESC LIMIT 5;
